title: Dreaming of a Red WEDDING: Meaning & Interpretation
seoDescription: Discover what dreaming of a red wedding means. In-depth Jungian analysis of red wedding dreams and their psychological significance.
introduction: When a wedding appears in your dreams colored by the quality of "red", its message becomes more specific and urgent. The combination reveals a powerful message from your unconscious mind.
symbolism:
The red quality adds the dimension of passion, anger, or vital energy to the core symbolism of wedding, which represents coniunctio (union of opposites).

This combination suggests your psyche is processing something with both the archetypal energy of the wedding AND the emotional charge of "red". Pay attention to how this made you feel in the dream.
cosmicAnalysis: Red WEDDING dreams are particularly potent during certain moon phases. A Full Moon amplifies the emotional intensity, while a New Moon suggests this symbol is emerging from deep within your unconscious for the first time.
commonScenarios: A red wedding approaching you - confrontation with this energy is imminent
Multiple red weddings - the message is being repeated for emphasis
Transforming into a red wedding - you are integrating this archetype
Running from a red wedding - avoidance of this aspect of yourself
cta: Every dream symbol carries personal meaning. Track your red wedding dreams over time to uncover deeper patterns.
